<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; interface ComparesCastableAttributes { /** * Determine if the given values are equal. * * @param \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model $model * @param string $key * @param mixed $firstValue * @param mixed $secondValue * @return bool */ public function compare(Model $model, string $key, mixed $firstValue, mixed $secondValue); }
